Description: Go to Register, fill username/email/password, confirm age 18+
Try to register with age under 18 — should be blocked
Try to register with an existing username (e.g. SuperAdmin)
Try to register with an already-used email
Try passwords like '123' or 'abc' — should show strength warning
Enter correct username + password (e.g. SuperAdmin / admin123)
Enter incorrect password — should show error message
Enter incorrect password 5+ times rapidly — should be temporarily locked out
Enter as guest with display name and birthdate, confirm age 18+
As guest, try to send a gift or post a comment — should be blocked
Click social login button and authenticate via Replit
Click logout and verify session is cleared
Register new account and check if verification email is received
Enter correct 6-digit code from email
Enter incorrect code — should show error
Enter phone number and request SMS code
Enter correct SMS code to verify phone number
Go to settings and link a new email to an account that has none
Go to settings and link a phone number
Remove a linked phone number from account settings
Open profile page — check username, avatar, level, XP, coins, followers, following display correctly
Update bio and avatar — changes should save and persist
Tap on any user to view their public profile
Tap Follow on another user's profile — follower count should update
Tap Unfollow — follower count should decrease
Open Followers tab — should show list of followers
Open Following tab — should show list of users being followed
Check if suggested users section appears with relevant recommendations
Block another user from their profile — they should not be able to interact
Report a user for inappropriate behavior — report should appear in admin queue
Visit another user's profile, then check if your visit appears in their Visitors list
Verify level and XP bar display correctly and match the user's actual data
Go to settings, delete account — personal data should be anonymized
Tap Go Live, enter title and category, start stream — video should broadcast

Steps Taken: Join a live stream as viewer
Description: From Home or Explore, tap on a live stream — should load and play video
Send a message in live chat — should appear in real-time for all viewers
Send a message with a filtered/banned word — should be blocked or censored
Tap the Like button rapidly — like animation should trigger
Join/leave a stream and verify viewer count updates in real-time
As host, end the stream — end-of-stream summary with stats should display
Browse streams by category — only streams in that category should appear
Enable location and check Nearby tab — should show geographically close streams
As host, set a coin goal — progress bar should be visible to viewers
Start a PK battle between two streamers — split-screen view should load, gift points should track for each side
As host, invite a viewer to join via audio/video guest seat
As host/moderator, mute a viewer — they should not be able to chat
As host/moderator, kick a viewer — they should be removed from the stream
As host/moderator, ban a viewer — they should not be able to rejoin
Unban a previously banned user — they should be able to rejoin
Enable Slow Mode — users should only be able to send messages at limited rate
Enable Block Links — messages containing URLs should be filtered
Open the gift panel in a live stream — list of available gifts with prices should display
Select a gift and send it to a streamer — animation should play, coins should deduct from sender
As host, receive a gift — diamonds should be credited to your account
Try to send a gift when coin balance is too low — should show error or prompt to buy coins
Check that coin balance is displayed correctly in the header/profile
Open the Coin Store — available packages with prices should display
Select a coin package, complete Stripe checkout — coins should be added to account
Start a Stripe checkout and cancel or use a declined card — no coins should be added
After successful payment verify that the webhook correctly credits coins
Open the Store page — badges, frames, and entry effects should display
Buy a profile frame or badge — item should appear in Item Bag
Go to Item Bag and equip a purchased frame — should reflect on profile
Try to buy an item without enough coins — should show error
Open VIP Plans page — tiers and benefits should be listed
Check that VIP users show the correct tier badge on their profile and in chat
Verify VIP-exclusive features (entry effects / special badges) work for VIP users
Spin the wheel once per day — prize should be awarded (coins or item)
Try spinning again after daily spin — should be blocked or require coins
After winning a prize verify coins/items are correctly added to account
Open Shorts tab — vertical video feed should load with swipe navigation
Create and upload a new short video — should appear in your profile and feed
Tap Like on a short — like count should increment
Tap Like again to unlike — count should decrement
Post a comment on a short — should appear in comment section
Add a reaction to a comment on a short
Visit a user profile and view their uploaded shorts
Open chat with another user, send a text message — should deliver in real-time
Open Chats tab — all active conversations should be listed
Open an unread conversation — messages should be marked as read
Block a user and verify their messages are no longer visible or receivable
Send a call request to another user — notification should appear for them
Accept an incoming call request — video call should connect
End an active call — both parties should return to normal view, billing should stop
Start a per-minute call and verify coins deduct correctly each minute
Start a per-session call and verify flat-rate coin deduction
Enable DND mode — incoming call requests should be blocked
Create a new family with name and description — should appear in family listings
Join a public family — member count should update
Leave a family — member count should decrease
Post a message in family chat — should be visible to all members
Open members list — all members with roles should display
Check family rankings based on total gifts — order should be correct
As family owner/admin, update family description or settings
Open Daily leaderboard — rankings should reflect today's activity
Open Weekly leaderboard — rankings should reflect this week's activity
Open All-time leaderboard — rankings should reflect lifetime totals
Check Top Gifters ranking — should list users by total gifts sent
Check Top Streamers ranking — should list streamers by gifts received
Log in for the first time today — should receive XP and/or coin bonus
View Achievements page — available and earned achievements should display
Complete an achievement requirement (e.g. first stream, first gift) — badge should unlock
Accumulate enough XP to level up — level should increment and notification should appear
Check Home page tabs: Following, For You, Nearby, Categories — each should load appropriate content
Use the search bar to search for a user by username — results should display
Open Explore page — streams and content should be browseable by category
Log in with admin credentials (AdminMike / admin123) — admin dashboard should load
View admin dashboard — total users, active streams, revenue metrics should display
Search for a user in admin panel, view and edit their details (coins, VIP tier, role)
Use admin to update a user's coins or VIP tier — changes should reflect on user's profile
Open Reports queue — user-submitted reports should be listed
Add/remove words from the content filter list — filtered words should be blocked in chat
Open Flagged Content — review and mark items as reviewed
Log in as SuperAdmin (SuperAdmin / admin123) — verify full access to all admin features
Disconnect internet while in a live stream — app should show reconnecting state, not crash
View pages with no data (no streams, no messages, no shorts) — should show friendly empty state, not errors
Enter very long text in bio, chat, or family name — should be truncated or show limit warning
Enter special characters and emojis in username, bio, and chat — should handle gracefully
Wait for session to expire or clear cookies — should redirect to login, not show broken state
Send multiple gifts rapidly, or double-tap Follow — should not create duplicate transactions
Resize browser to mobile viewport — all pages should be usable and not overflow
Send gifts during a PK Battle — points should credit to the correct side
Join a stream as a VIP user — entry effect and badge should be visible
Follow a host from within their live stream — should work without leaving the stream
Tap a username in live chat — should navigate to their profile
Send a gift to a family member during a stream — family leaderboard should update
